title: Review Overall System AGV Status Popup For Fleet Status And Errors
summary: Use the Overall System AGV Status popup to review fleet-wide AGV information. The source indicates the top section shows detailed information for all AGVs, including ID, Status, Destination, and Errors, while the bottom section shows only AGVs with errors and additional detail.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing current AGV fleet status on the HMI and when identifying which AGVs show errors and additional error detail on the Overall System AGV Status popup.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to infer meanings or corrective actions beyond the status, destination, errors, and additional detail explicitly shown on the popup.
Do not use this procedure when the needed AGV information is not visible on the popup.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review the Overall System AGV Status popup, inspect AGV fields and error detail, and record which AGVs are shown with errors.

safety_notes: This procedure is source-supported as a status and error review activity on an HMI popup.
Do not infer corrective actions beyond what is explicitly shown by the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the HMI screen showing the 'Overall System AGV Status' popup
Visibility of AGV fields for ID, Status, Destination, and Errors

access_required: Access to the HMI screen showing the 'Overall System AGV Status' popup
system_preconditions: The Overall System AGV Status popup is available for viewing.
AGV information fields are visible on the popup.

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Overall System AGV Status popup with top and bottom sections and the fields described by the source.

steps.title: Open or view the Overall System AGV Status popup
steps.purpose: Access the popup used to review fleet-wide AGV status information.
steps.instruction: Open or view the 'Overall System AGV Status' popup on the HMI.
steps.expected_result: The Overall System AGV Status popup is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The popup is visible and shows the AGV status display with top and bottom sections.
steps.failure_condition: The popup is not visible or the needed AGV information cannot be viewed.

actions.label: View AGV status popup
actions.exact_action: Open or view the 'Overall System AGV Status' popup.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: HMI popup labeled 'Overall System AGV Status' with top and bottom sections.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the needed AGV information is not visible on the popup.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Another popup shows detailed information for all the AGVs; OCR identifies the screen as 'Overall System AGV Status'.

steps.title: Review AGV fields in the top section
steps.purpose: Inspect the standard fleet-wide fields shown for all AGVs.
steps.instruction: In the top section, review the listed AGV information fields for all AGVs: ID, Status, Destination, and Errors.
steps.expected_result: The top section shows the standard AGV information fields for all AGVs.
steps.healthy_condition: AGV entries are visible with ID, Status, Destination, and Errors fields.
steps.failure_condition: One or more expected AGV information fields are not visible in the top section.

actions.label: Inspect top section fields
actions.exact_action: In the top section, review the listed AGV information fields for all AGVs: ID, Status, Destination, and Errors.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Top section showing detailed info for all AGVs, including ID, Status, Destination, and Errors.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the needed AGV information is not visible on the popup.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Detailed info for all AGVs — ID, Status, Destination, and Errors.

steps.title: Identify status, destination, and error state for each AGV
steps.purpose: Determine the reported state of each AGV from the displayed fields.
steps.instruction: Check each AGV entry to identify the reported status, destination, and whether an error is shown.
steps.expected_result: Each AGV entry has been reviewed for status, destination, and error indication.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed AGV entries can be read and interpreted directly from the popup fields.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed information is insufficient to understand the reported AGV state or error indication.

actions.label: Review each AGV entry
actions.exact_action: Check each AGV entry to identify the reported status, destination, and whether an error is shown.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: AGV rows in the top section showing status, destination, and error fields.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed information is insufficient to understand the reported error.
Do not infer meanings or corrective actions beyond the status, destination, errors, and additional detail explicitly shown by the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Detailed info for all AGVs — ID, Status, Destination, and Errors.

steps.title: Review the bottom section for AGVs with errors
steps.purpose: Inspect the error-focused section that provides additional detail for AGVs with errors.
steps.instruction: In the bottom section, look for AGVs that appear with errors and review the additional detail shown for those AGVs.
steps.expected_result: AGVs with errors are identified in the bottom section and their additional detail is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: Only AGVs with errors appear in the bottom section, with additional detail shown for those AGVs.
steps.failure_condition: The bottom section does not show the expected error-focused detail or the information is insufficient to understand the reported error.

actions.label: Inspect error detail section
actions.exact_action: In the bottom section, look for AGVs that appear with errors and review the additional detail shown for those AGVs.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Bottom section of the popup showing only AGVs with errors and additional details.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed information is insufficient to understand the reported error.
Do not infer meanings or corrective actions beyond the status, destination, errors, and additional detail explicitly shown by the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Only AGVs with errors with additional detail will appear; OCR notes a bottom section for only AGVs with errors.

steps.title: Record AGVs shown with errors
steps.purpose: Capture the error-related AGV information visible on the popup for review or handoff.
steps.instruction: Record which AGVs are listed with errors and the associated status, destination, and error details shown on the popup.
steps.expected_result: A record exists of the AGVs shown with errors and the details visible on the popup.
steps.healthy_condition: The recorded information matches what is explicitly shown on the popup.
steps.failure_condition: The popup does not provide enough visible information to record the AGV error details clearly.

actions.label: Record displayed AGV error details
actions.exact_action: Record which AGVs are listed with errors and the associated status, destination, and error details shown on the popup.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Displayed AGV status and error detail fields used to record which AGVs have errors.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the displayed information is insufficient to understand the reported error.
Do not infer meanings or corrective actions beyond the status, destination, errors, and additional detail explicitly shown by the source.

Only AGVs with errors with additional detail will appear; OCR notes a bottom section for only AGVs with errors.

success_criteria: The Overall System AGV Status popup is visible.
The user can review AGV ID, Status, Destination, and Errors for all AGVs.
The user can identify which AGVs appear in the error-focused bottom section.
The user records which AGVs are listed with errors and the associated displayed details.
healthy_conditions: The popup shows detailed information for all AGVs in the top section.
The top section includes ID, Status, Destination, and Errors fields.
The bottom section shows only AGVs with errors and additional detail.
failure_conditions: The Overall System AGV Status popup is not visible.
Needed AGV information is not visible on the popup.
Displayed information is insufficient to understand the reported error.
The user would need to infer meanings or corrective actions not explicitly shown by the source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the needed AGV information is not visible on the popup.
Escalate if the displayed information is insufficient to understand the reported error.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall System AGV Status popup with top section for all AGVs and bottom section for AGVs with errors.

missing_details: The source does not specify the exact navigation path to open the Overall System AGV Status popup.
The source does not define corrective actions for any AGV error shown on the popup.
The source does not provide a time estimate for completing this review.
The source does not specify supporting roles beyond the inferred L1 support reviewer role.
